untranslatable_reason: Signal requires realized volatility vs implied volatility trend correlation over N consecutive days and divergence detection over N consecutive days. Available indicators (hvol_20, india_vix) do not provide granular trend-following and multi-day correlation/divergence logic. The rule also requires dynamic spread selection (backspread vs ratio vertical) which is a position construction decision, not a price-based entry/exit signal. Parameters like 'trend_confirmation_days' and 'correlation_lookback' cannot be operationalized with allowed operators.
translation_notes: Approximated using hvol_20 (realized volatility proxy) and india_vix (implied volatility proxy) at percentile thresholds. Entry triggers when both are elevated and ADX confirms trend; exit triggers divergence. However, this is a lossy approximation—the original signal's core logic around sustained correlation between realized and implied volatility trends cannot be fully captured with available indicators and operators.
